Original: Her wife always appears content with her lot in life.
Tradução: Sua esposa sempre parece satisfeita com sua sorte na vida.

Original: His wife always appears content with her lot in life.
Tradução: Sua esposa sempre parece satisfeita com sua sorte na vida.

Original: Don't know how he manages to keep his marriage so healthy. Mine's rotten to the core!

Original: Don't know how she manages to keep her marriage so healthy. Mine's rotten to the core!

Original: I don't know how she does it, but her husband seems very happy.

Original: She sure knows how to keep that wife of hers happy.

Original: Perhaps her secret lies in always going adventuring, but her marriage seems to work.

Original: Perhaps his secret lies in always going adventuring, but his marriage seems to work.

Original: That son of yours never seems to get up to any mischief.

Original: That boy of yours knows how to behave. Not like most kids.

Original: I don't usually care much for kids. Buut your son is a real peach.

Original: I bet you can't wait to see your son again. He's such a lovely boy.

Original: Don't know how he manages to keep his marriage so healthy. Mine's rotten to the core!
